name: 运动学
subject: physics
curriculum_points: HS-PS2-1. Analyze data to support the claim that Newton’s second law of motion describes the mathematical relationship among the net force on a macroscopic object, its mass, and its acceleration.
HS-PS2-2. Use mathematical representations to support the claim that the total momentum of a system of objects is conserved when there is no net force on the system.

interactive_resources.description: PhET 运动人：位置/速度/加速度关系（中文版）
Desmos 匀变速直线运动公式交互
GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「运动学」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-PS2-1. Analyze data to support the claim that Newton’s second law of motion describes the mathematical relationship a…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-PS2-2. Use mathematical representations to support the claim that the total m… 对理解「运动学」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
